plugins.name: io
plugins.description: Explore → plan → build workflow for backend features. `develop-feature` for multi-day, multi-topic features; `develop-mini-feature` for ~day-scale, 1–2 area features with a one-way graduation path between them.

plugins.name: karpathy
plugins.description: Behavioral guidelines to reduce common LLM coding mistakes — surface assumptions and inconsistencies, keep code minimal, make surgical changes.
